header: Your editors will actually enjoy the page module
description: All 255 Desiderio content elements ship with a real backend preview — editors see the page taking shape as they build it, not a stack of gray placeholder boxes. That's onboarding measured in minutes, not days.

image.title: Desiderio page module preview
image.alternative: TYPO3 page module showing rich backend previews of Desiderio content elements.
